title: Kimi K3: Open Frontier Intelligence
author: vincent_s
aiHeadline: Kimi K3: Because regular frontier intelligence wasn't enough to make you question your life choices.

title: The lost joy of music piracy
author: mcgin
aiHeadline: The lost joy of music piracy: When illegally downloading music was the highlight of your week and made you feel like a modern-day Robin Hood.

title: Sony deletes more movies from the accounts of people who ‘bought’ them
author: nekusar
aiHeadline: Sony deletes more movies from people who 'bought' them: Because nothing says 'thank you for your money' like deleting your purchased content.

title: Microsoft Comic Chat is now open source
author: jervant
aiHeadline: Microsoft Comic Chat is now open source: Finally, the world can see the code that makes Microsoft's attempts at humor as cringeworthy as their operating systems.

title: OnePlus halts operations in USA and Europe
author: pilililo2
aiHeadline: OnePlus halts operations in USA and Europe: Because nothing says 'global domination' like quietly shutting down in the regions you were trying to conquer.
